channel.title: repo on Thengakula Techs
channel.description: Recent content in repo on Thengakula Techs

item.title: Repo Installation and Configuration
item.description: Repo Installation and Basic Configuration Repo, a Google-built repository-management tool that runs on top of Git. Repo unifies Git repositories when necessary, performs uploads to the Gerrit revision control system, and automates parts of the Android development workflow. Installation Repo comes in two parts: One is a launcher script you install, and it communicates with the second part, the full Repo tool included in a source code checkout. To install Repo:
